po_authorization_ref: PO permanent GitHub execution/reporting/delivery operating rule (governance/documentation only)
scope_allowed: Add the permanent GitHub execution/delivery rule to authoritative instructions, decision register, artifact registry, validators, changed-file-manifest generator and final-report template; commit and push on a dedicated governance branch and open one PR.
scope_prohibited: No Phase 1B implementation; no DB/DDL/DML/role/DSN/service/PMS/FIAS/network/deployment/config change; repository is the sole authoritative source.
acceptance_verdict: GOVERNANCE-ONLY — permanent GitHub execution/delivery rule applied; pending Product-Owner approval
next_action: Product-Owner approval of this permanent GitHub execution and delivery operating rule and the corrected Phase 1B plan
